hero.title: Hi, I am
hero.description: Senior Software Engineer with over 10 years of experience delivering high-performance, scalable web solutions. Expert in the JavaScript ecosystem (React.js, Node.js) with a proven track record of architecting modern systems. Dedicated to team mentoring, code reviews, and leveraging AI-driven tools (GitHub Copilot, Cursor) to optimize workflows.

jobs.description: Creating and evolving internal management software focused on B2B communication and internal operation flows. Taking on roles of analyst, architect, and team lead, providing mentoring and code reviews.
Led a team of 3 developers to build a new module for the core application. Optimized scalability by implementing a micro-frontend architecture with Module Federation.
Frontend maintenance of an on-demand mobility platform. Built a Progressive Web App (PWA) to create new requests more easily for users.
Developed a comprehensive administrative dashboard for real-time logistics, a content monetization platform for eCommerce, and migrated a large sports company website to Angular 12.
Full-stack development for an insurance company, pharmacy management project, and basic application skeletons. Managed coworker assignments for the Cádiz office.
Analysis, development, and maintenance of company systems. Managed different projects and tasks with Jira.
Development and maintenance of a complete management system for security certificates with workflows.
Development of internal application to manage online bids.

items.institution: School of Engineering of the University of Cadiz
items.description: Great involvement with the student delegation. Final Project: Computer systems designer, analyst and Full-stack developer building a real-time interaction web platform using WAMP.

contact.title: Let's Talk
contact.description: Whether you have a question or just want to say hi, I'll try my best to get back to you!
